videos.description:

We hit the streets of Seoul, South Korea to find out how foreigners feel about living in Korea. The opinions expressed in this video are those of individual interviewees alone

videos.title: Eating at Street Markets In South Korea!
videos.description:
South Korea Is a new top favorite country!! Everyone is so nice, the city is clean and the food is amazing! We are excited to be here a few days! 

We love you all so much!
DALLIN AND BELLA

videos.title: OUR FIRST TIME in SOUTH KOREA - SEOUL 🇰🇷
videos.description:
Our first time ever in South Korea, we fly into Seoul and explore this futuristic mega city for the first 24 hours. We visit Myeong-dong, try Korean barbecue for the first time, eat street food and share our first impressions of this modern city!

videos.title: Amazing Places to visit in South Korea - Travel Video
